necessityProof.blockerResolved: The credential-handle approval and no-network safety fixture prerequisite chains repeated the same markdown title/meta/section skeleton while keeping important contract and closure details embedded in long renderer bodies.
necessityProof.laterConsumer: N5 Phase-B review can now distinguish shared report skeleton from approval-chain-specific contract, echo, and prerequisite lines before deciding whether any deeper typed helper is justified.
necessityProof.reuseDecision: The shared report builder owns the report frame. Contract required/prohibited fields, no-go boundaries, upstream echo evidence files, and completed/remaining prerequisite lines remain local because their line formats differ by chain and carry approval-specific semantics.
necessityProof.growthStopCondition: This batch adds no new helper. A future helper should only be introduced after at least two additional prerequisite chains prove byte-identical, same-field line shapes that are not already covered by the existing archive or evidence file helpers.

focusedRendererBatch.command: npx vitest run test/verificationReportBuilder.test.ts test/governanceGrowthRatchet.test.ts and 6 credential/no-network prerequisite chain tests --testTimeout=180000

byteIdenticalCompare.method: Temporary Vitest test loaded legacy renderer source from git HEAD, rewired imports to current source modules, loaded real profiles, and asserted equality with each migrated renderer output.

lint.note: Warnings are the existing v2115 baseline and are outside this renderer-consolidation batch.

archiveDeliverables: 代码讲解记录_生产雏形阶段3/r2000/2100-renderer-consolidation-batch-12-v2129.md

crossProjectParallel.reason: v2129 only changes Node markdown rendering for existing managed-audit approval-chain reports; it does not request fresh sibling evidence, live integration, upstream service startup, or schema changes.
